opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Fred Pratt's site has no booking tool, contact form, or GMB booking button — phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors who offer instant scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture leads when Fred's phones are closed.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected; 267 reviews suggest a large existing customer base.
opportunities.observation: Hundreds of past Boise customers receive zero seasonal tune-up reminders, leaving recurring revenue unclaimed.
opportunities.fix: Automate spring cooling and fall heating reminders via SMS and email to past customers.

opportunities.label: Call Capture and CRM
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with zero CRM or marketing tools detected on Fred Pratt's website.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call disappears permanently with no follow-up system in place.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture that logs caller details and triggers automatic follow-up sequences.
